title: PWGood MS1 birch house totem
description: This texture-pack changes the model totem of undying and changes its name in the game.
body:
- the model of the totem of immortality has been changed to the house from this video:
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/A6qiLKj4cDs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
  
- changes the name in the game
  - **English(US)**
  - **Русский(Россия)**
